recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: The sensuous wife of a lunch wagon proprietor and a rootless drifter begin a sordidly steamy affair and conspire to murder her Greek husband.

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: Gino, a drifter, begins an affair with inn-owner Giovanna as they plan to get rid of her older husband.

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: Pandora's Box
recommendations.overview: The rise and inevitable fall of an amoral but naive young woman whose insouciant eroticism inspires lust and violence in those around her.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A married woman and her lover plot to kill her husband to make off with the insurance money. However, their attempt to murder him using poisonous fish toxins backfires in surprising ways.

recommendations.title: Miller's Crossing
recommendations.overview: Set in 1929, a political boss and his advisor have a parting of the ways when they both fall for the same woman.

recommendations.title: Heaven
recommendations.overview: A woman takes the law into her own hands after police ignore her pleas to arrest the man responsible for her husband's death, and finds herself not only under arrest for murder but falling in love with an officer.
